core_ideas: Introduces the Transformer architecture that replaces recurrence and convolution with attention-only mechanisms (self-attention, multi-head attention) and positional encodings.
architecture_and_design: Encoder-decoder stacks of identical layers (N=6 base); multi-head scaled dot-product attention; position-wise feed-forward networks; residual connections and layer normalization; sinusoidal positional encodings.
training_and_data: Trained on WMT 2014 EN-DE (~4.5M pairs) and EN-FR (~36M). Byte-Pair/word-piece tokenization; Adam optimizer with warmup schedule; trained on 8 P100 GPUs; base and big variants with checkpoint averaging.
evaluation_and_metrics: BLEU scores on WMT 2014 EN-DE and EN-FR (primary), dev-set perplexities, constituency parsing F1 on WSJ; ablation tables for hyperparameter effects.
key_results: Transformer(base): EN-DE BLEU ~27.3, EN-FR ~38.1. Transformer(big): EN-DE BLEU ~28.4, EN-FR ~41.8. See extracted CSVs under /_outputs/pdf_task_output/tables/ for numeric tables.
limitations: O(n^2) self-attention complexity; reliance on GPU-parallel training infrastructure; original experiments focused on text translation/parsing; positional encoding extrapolation speculative.
